name: Philly Double Chocolate Layer Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) Philadelphia Cream Cheese, softened
3 squares semisweet chocolate, melted, slightly cooled
1 ready-to-use chocolate flavor crumb crust (6 oz or 9-in)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, sugar and vanilla with a mixer on medium speed until blended.
2. Add eggs; mix until blended.
3. Stir melted chocolate into 1 cup of the batter.
4. Pour chocolate batter onto the crust.
5. Top with plain batter.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until center is almost set.
7. Cool and refrigerate for 3 hours or overnight.
YIELD: 8 servings
